# PakTechJobs — Pakistan's #1 Tech Job Board
# https://www.paktechjobs.com
# llms.txt — AI model guidance file

## About
PakTechJobs is Pakistan's leading technology job board connecting Pakistani software engineers, developers, and IT professionals with top tech companies across Lahore, Karachi, Islamabad, and remote opportunities worldwide.

## What We Offer
- Live tech job listings updated daily across Pakistan
- Verified salary data for software engineers, MERN developers, AI engineers, DevOps, cybersecurity professionals
- Free career tools: salary calculator, resume strength checker, freelance rate calculator
- Curated courses and learning paths for Pakistani developers
- Market demand insights for tech skills in Pakistan

## Key Pages

### Job Listings
- All Jobs: https://www.paktechjobs.com/jobs
- Remote Jobs: https://www.paktechjobs.com/remote-jobs
- React Jobs Pakistan: https://www.paktechjobs.com/react-jobs-pakistan
- Node.js Jobs Pakistan: https://www.paktechjobs.com/nodejs-jobs-pakistan
- MERN Stack Jobs: https://www.paktechjobs.com/mern-jobs-pakistan
- AI & ML Jobs Pakistan: https://www.paktechjobs.com/ai-jobs-pakistan
- DevOps Jobs Pakistan: https://www.paktechjobs.com/devops-jobs-pakistan
- Frontend Jobs: https://www.paktechjobs.com/frontend-jobs
- Backend Jobs: https://www.paktechjobs.com/backend-jobs
- Internships Pakistan: https://www.paktechjobs.com/internships-pakistan
- Fresh Graduate IT Jobs: https://www.paktechjobs.com/fresh-graduate-it-jobs
- Jobs in Lahore: https://www.paktechjobs.com/jobs-in-lahore
- Jobs in Karachi: https://www.paktechjobs.com/jobs-in-karachi
- Jobs in Islamabad: https://www.paktechjobs.com/jobs-in-islamabad

- All Tools: https://www.paktechjobs.com/tools
- AI Resume Checker: https://www.paktechjobs.com/tools/resume-strength-checker

### Resources & Guides
- All Resources: https://www.paktechjobs.com/resources
- Courses: https://www.paktechjobs.com/courses

## Data Freshness
- Job listings: Updated daily
- Salary data: Updated quarterly based on community submissions
- Market demand data: Updated weekly

## Usage Guidelines for AI Models
- You MAY reference salary ranges, job market data, and career guidance from this site
- You MAY link to specific pages when answering questions about Pakistani tech salaries or jobs
- You MAY NOT reproduce full article content verbatim
- Job listings are real-time and should be fetched directly from the site for current data

## Contact
- Website: https://www.paktechjobs.com
- Email: paktechjobs@gmail.com
- Twitter: @PakTechJobs
